---
title: "test_gevp"
---

::: {.callout-note appearance="minimal"}
**Source:** [`test/test_gevp.py`](https://github.com/simone-romiti/lattice_data_tools/blob/main/test/test_gevp.py)
:::


## API Reference

#### `_make_spd_correlator` {#_make_spd_correlator}

```python
def _make_spd_correlator(N, T, seed=42)
```

Create a (N, N, T) random symmetric positive-definite correlator matrix.

[View source ↗](https://github.com/simone-romiti/lattice_data_tools/blob/main/test/test_gevp.py#L10){.source-link style='font-size:0.8em;'}

---

#### `test_gevp_eigenvalues_shape` {#test_gevp_eigenvalues_shape}

```python
def test_gevp_eigenvalues_shape()
```

[View source ↗](https://github.com/simone-romiti/lattice_data_tools/blob/main/test/test_gevp.py#L22){.source-link style='font-size:0.8em;'}

---

#### `test_gevp_eigenvalues_real` {#test_gevp_eigenvalues_real}

```python
def test_gevp_eigenvalues_real()
```

[View source ↗](https://github.com/simone-romiti/lattice_data_tools/blob/main/test/test_gevp.py#L31){.source-link style='font-size:0.8em;'}

---
